title: Nuclino Item
description: A Nuclino item (wiki page) or collection (page group). Items contain Markdown content; collections group items hierarchically.

object.description: Distinguishes between a wiki page (item) and a folder/group (collection)

id.description: Unique identifier for the item or collection

workspaceId.description: ID of the workspace the item belongs to

url.description: Direct URL to view the item in the Nuclino application

title.description: Title of the item or collection

content.description: Body text in Markdown format. Only returned when retrieving a single item (not in list responses).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was created

createdUserId.description: ID of the user who created the item

lastUpdatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the item was last modified

lastUpdatedUserId.description: ID of the user who last modified the item

childIds.description: Ordered list of child item/collection IDs (present on collections)

highlight.description: Snippet of text showing the search query match context. Only present in search results.
